patch.insert_text: Home medications confirmed with daughter: aspirin 81 mg, atenolol 50 mg, lisinopril 20 mg, and rosuvastatin 40 mg daily, with good adherence.

reasons: Rosuvastatin 40 mg daily is supported by evidence span 'rosuvastatin forty'
The added claim (rosuvastatin) is new; existing meds are re-listed only for merge, no duplicated new fact
Home medications belong in the Subjective section, consistent with existing med list placement
